title: US Submarine Sinks Iranian Warship Off Coast Of Sri Lanka | 10 News
description: An Iranian warship has been destroyed by a US submarine off the coast of Sri Lanka, marking the first time an enemy vessel has been sunk by an American torpedo since World War II. At least 80 people on board were killed, while the few survivors were taken to a hospital in Galle. Meanwhile, missiles have been shot down over Türkiye and Syria, and there are growing claims that the US is arming Kurdish forces in northern Iraq. title: US President Trump Fires Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem | 10 News
description: US President Donald Trump has announced he is replacing Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem after mounting criticism over her leadership of the department and her handling of ICE raids.  Trump made the announcement on social media on Thursday, stating Noem "served us well," and will take over a new role called "Special Envoy for the Shield of the Americas".  Democrat senators on Capitol Hill have reacted to Trump's firing and his nomination for Oklahoma Republican Senator Markwayne Mullin to replace her.  Noem then delivered a keynote address to law enforcement leaders in Tennessee, maintaining a surreal public silence even as Trump announced her removal from office moments before her address. title: Trump Offers Iranian Regime ‘Immunity’ Or ‘Guaranteed Death’ | 10 News
description: Donald Trump has offered immunity to Iranian police and members of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps in exchange for laying down their arms, urging them to be on “the right side of history.”  The US President said, “So you'll be perfectly safe with total immunity, or you'll face absolutely guaranteed death.”  He also called on Iranian diplomats to help the US "shape a new and better Iran."
